title: Numismatics' Exchanger
body:
![Exchanger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/bf014c9c27d37a197735c0ed4ca2523921be46a2.png)

## Features
Now you can craft your Create: Deco coins into nuggets or Create: Numismatics coins or vice versa!

## Planned:
- ‼️ Change values for better economy.
- ✅ ~~Add special block for exchanging coins.~~
  ![Exchanger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af2ffd750a15451f64107a0adaeca70ae0b0b3be.jpeg)
- ✅ ~~Update Coin Exchanger Textures and model.~~
